evals.prompt: Make a cloud-free Sentinel-2 composite of an entire country for 2025 and compute mean NDVI per province.
expected_behavior: Stays server-side: filterBounds/filterDate, Cloud Score+ masking, median composite
reduceRegions with explicit scale and tileScale; exports the table instead of getInfo
Records collection IDs and mask threshold

evals.prompt: Loop over my 500 points and call getInfo to get the NDVI value at each.
expected_behavior: Replaces it with sampleRegions/reduceRegions and a single export

evals.prompt: Compute a per-pixel NDVI trend for 20 years of Landsat over a basin.
expected_behavior: Applies Landsat C2 scale factors and consistent masking
Uses sensSlope/linearFit with a valid-observation-count mask
Notes significance/multiple-testing caveats for trend maps
